framing: Frozen engineering/QC tolerances, NOT inferential cutoffs. No p-values, no FDR.
principles: scale-aware: no cross-program raw-median comparison (A/B are on different scales)
membership-free: no zero-origin sign test, no above-median cell membership
stage1_selectable_by_condition stored per condition, not one global boolean
stage2_base_portability kept separate from stage-1 measurement validity
on failure: record nonselectable for that condition; do NOT retune markers/seeds/thresholds afterward

gates.rule: n_panel_in_effect_universe >= 3 AND n_control_in_effect_universe >= 10; record retained panel/control coefficient fractions
gates.consequence: else stage2_unavailable (separate from stage-1 validity); target-specific masking remains a stage-2 gate

gates.rule: in every donor at condition C: panel-score IQR > 0 AND >=2 panel genes detected in >=1% of cells

gates.stratum: program x condition x removed_marker x donor
gates.rule: controls FIXED; compare panel_mean_full vs panel_mean_minus_gene (NOT the control-sharing scores); for every removed marker and donor at C: Spearman rho >= 0.80 AND median(|delta_panel|)/IQR(panel_mean_full) <= 0.25
gates.consequence: fail program x condition; undefined metric fails

gates.stratum: program x condition x seed x donor
gates.rule: 20 alternative master seeds 12346..12365; for every seed and donor x condition: primary-vs-alternative score rho >= 0.90 AND |median_alt - median_primary|/IQR_primary <= 0.25
both programs pass at the selected condition; same real condition; all four donors; no sensitivity lane; no All; reject identical program+direction
per-donor Spearman rho(A,B) within the selected condition; pair_redundant=true if |rho| >= 0.90 in >=3 of 4 donors; store all four signed rho
gates.consequence: advisory pair-level flag only; never blocks selection or invalidates a program

gates.rule: for every other evaluable primary program C, per-donor rho(A,C) and rho(B,C) separately; record in off_axis_associations if |rho| >= 0.90 in >=3 of 4 donors; exclude sensitivity lanes; never construct A-B; undefined rho -> not_evaluable
gates.consequence: record/flag only; never a selection block or program failure

gates.rule: EXACT frozen donor x condition barcode counts (not +-1 percentage point)
IQR-standardized median error <= 0.10 * full-data IQR AND ECDF sup-distance D <= 0.05 (no KS p-value)
gates.consequence: blocks overlay release, not program selectability

gates.rule: max pairwise Spearman difference between overlay and full data <= 0.10
report stratified rank concordance + IQR-standardized shifts
